missingExistingIdsReason: The package starts from the user style-improved two-dashboard YAPK and preserves existing dashboard, child list, field, and list-view IDs.
dynamicControlsRule: Dynamic controls are only generated inside the Kanban item template.
dashboard02GridRule: Vendor Management Dashboard 02 uses flex containers for row layout and no flex_grid controls to avoid possible Grid property conflicts.
listLayoutViewRule: Each child List.LayoutView includes add:'default', edit:'default', opentype:{view:'new'}, sort:[], and view pointing to the default Type 0 view LayoutID.
